description: A square designed graphic in ICE's recurring 'THE WORST FIRST' rogues-gallery template. The background is the standard desaturated black-and-white macro photograph of handcuffed hands against a dark body, serving as a generic image rather than a photo of the named subject. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'CHICAGO' in white serif caps. Top-left cyan bold sans-serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL'; white sub-line '2/10/2025 | Chicago, IL.' The arrestee's name is set large in white bold sans-serif over four lines: 'Jose Miguel Perez-Perez.' Below is the white 'CRIME:' label and a bulleted charge 'Child sexual assault.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark sit at bottom left; a red '-THE- WORST FIRST' box at bottom right. The fixed template (red/white/black with cyan accent) pairs an anonymized handcuffs stock image with a named individual and an emphasized child-sex charge as a propaganda technique to frame immigration detainees as 'the worst' criminals and justify deportation. Audience: the general public and supporters of immigration enforcement.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/10/2025 | Chicago, IL; Jose Miguel Perez-Perez; CRIME: Child sexual assault; CHICAGO; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
